# AgentsOrg

> AI Transformation Intelligence: open-source governance platform for enterprise ChatGPT

AgentsOrg is an open-source platform that connects to OpenAI's Compliance API to discover, classify, and semantically enrich every Custom GPT and Project in an enterprise workspace. It surfaces actionable intelligence through a Leader Dashboard, Employee Portal, and Learning & Development module. Every pipeline run ends with a board-ready executive summary and ranked priority actions.

Built for AI Transformation Leaders at organizations running ChatGPT Enterprise or Team.

## Founder

- [Ori Simantov](https://agentsorg.ai/about): AI transformation leader and data scientist with 10+ years of experience. Built AgentsOrg from lived experience scaling enterprise AI adoption. His enterprise AI transformation work was recognized by OpenAI: https://openai.com/index/hibob/

## Key pages

- [Home](https://agentsorg.ai/): Landing page: platform overview, features, roadmap, FAQ
- [Advisors Directory](https://agentsorg.ai/advisors): 52+ AI Transformation Advisors who help enterprises govern ChatGPT. Apply to join.
- [Blog](https://agentsorg.ai/blog): Articles on AI Transformation Intelligence, GPT governance, and enterprise AI maturity

## Blog posts

- [The AI Center of Excellence Playbook for ChatGPT Enterprise](https://agentsorg.ai/blog/ai-center-of-excellence-playbook): How to build an AI CoE with a three-layer org structure, four-tier governance model, and 60-day launch plan
- [How to Measure ROI on ChatGPT Enterprise (Without Guessing)](https://agentsorg.ai/blog/chatgpt-enterprise-roi-measurement): Data-driven ROI framework using five portfolio-level metrics: maturity distribution, duplication rate, builder concentration, adoption friction, process coverage
- [Shadow AI: How to Discover What's Actually Running in Your ChatGPT Workspace](https://agentsorg.ai/blog/shadow-ai-discovery-enterprise): Practical framework for discovering, risk-scoring, and governing ungoverned Custom GPTs and Projects before they become a liability
- [What Is AI Transformation Intelligence?](https://agentsorg.ai/blog/ai-transformation-intelligence): Defines the discipline of using semantic analysis and automation to govern enterprise AI portfolios
- [The GPT Portfolio Maturity Model](https://agentsorg.ai/blog/gpt-portfolio-maturity-model): Framework for classifying Custom GPTs as Experimental (60%), Functional (25%), or Production (15%)
- [The Enterprise Custom GPT Governance Guide](https://agentsorg.ai/blog/enterprise-custom-gpt-governance-guide): Five-pillar framework for governing Custom GPTs and Projects at scale: discovery, assessment, risk, optimization, lifecycle

## Core concepts

- **AI Transformation Intelligence (ATI)**: The discipline of using data and LLM-powered semantic analysis to understand, govern, and optimize an organization's AI portfolio
- **GPT Portfolio Maturity Model**: Classifies every Custom GPT as Production (sophistication 4-5), Functional (3), or Experimental (1-2)
- **Quality x Adoption Quadrant**: Plots every GPT as Champion (scale), Hidden Gem (promote), Scaled Risk (fix), or Retirement Candidate (decommission)
- **9 Semantic KPIs**: Risk level, sophistication, prompting quality, ROI potential, business process, intended audience, integration flags, output type, adoption friction
- **Semantic Duplicate Detection**: pgvector-powered clustering that finds redundant Custom GPTs and Projects even when named differently
- **Workflow Coverage Analysis**: Maps conversations and assets to business processes; detects Covered workflows, Ghost Coverage (built but unused), and Intent Gaps (demand with no asset)
- **Build Signals**: When multiple teams independently build the same GPT, that convergence is a demand signal to certify one org standard

## Platform support

- **Live today**: ChatGPT Enterprise and ChatGPT Team (via OpenAI Compliance API)
- **Roadmap**: Claude for Business (Anthropic) and Google Gemini for Workspace

## Open source

- GitHub: https://github.com/ori129/agentsorg
- License: Apache 2.0
- Self-hosted via Docker Compose
- Demo mode included: no API keys required
